title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Zomato

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Zomato
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Zomato in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!
